result.stdout:
analyze
  usage: analyze [<path>] [-q|--quota <value>] [-d|--depth <value>]
  description: Analyzes size for specified directory
  arguments:
	0: <path>	 path to analyze  parameters:
	-q, --quota	 Min. size for directory to be displayed. By default it is 10 GB. If no unit is provided it will use MB as a default.
	-d, --depth	 Max depth of displayed tree of folders that exceeds quota

commands.payload:
analyze
  usage: analyze [<path>] [-q|--quota <value>] [-d|--depth <value>]
  description: Analyzes size for specified directory
  arguments:
	0: <path>	 path to analyze  parameters:
	-q, --quota	 Min. size for directory to be displayed. By default it is 10 GB. If no unit is provided it will use MB as a default.
	-d, --depth	 Max depth of displayed tree of folders that exceeds quota
